title: hseos Repository Replay Plan
description: Contract defining the mandatory structure for curated repository replay plans.

Epic.description: Logical epic identifier discovered from the legacy repository.

Story.description: Minimal reproducible story or unit of work.

Hash.description: Git commit hash from Repository A that anchors this story.

Subject.description: Technical intent of the change, extracted from legacy history.

Author.description: Original author of the legacy commit.

Date.description: Original commit timestamp (ISO 8601). Defines chronological replay order.
